content:
# Transient_Electromagnetic

**Summary**: An active EM method used to measure subsurface resistivity, particularly effective for shallow-to-medium depth investigations.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024]] employed transient electromagnetic (TEM) data from 35 stations to produce pseudo-3D resistivity models using Aarhus SPIA software.

## Key Results and Findings

- Comparison of TEM and MT data showed agreement in identifying anomalies at depths between 100m and 300m. ([[2024-ahmed|Ahmed, 2024, p. 53]])
